title: FOMO Is the Cyberpsychosis of the AI Era
abstract: This cutting-edge tool sheds light on the anxiety and urgency felt in the age of AI, offering insights into the psychological impacts of FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) in the digital era.
abstract_zh: 这款神器啊，就是专门戳中你内心那根柔软的稻草，告诉你这个时代AI来得太快就像龙卷风了，它不仅让你时刻害怕错过什么新鲜事（FOMO），还让你在虚拟世界里天天焦虑不安，这玩意儿看了心里直打鼓。
